meta.scenario_name: Border patrol with single-missile breakthrough warning
meta.scenario_description: Most targets remain in peripheral reconnaissance, feint, escort, interference, or standoff support roles, while a single missile approaches on an attack geometry that requires warning and interception.

enemies.label: T1
enemies.name: T1(high-altitude UAV reconnaissance)
enemies.decision_reason: The target mainly observes and records track information instead of entering the engagement zone.
enemies.core_features: high-altitude orbit

enemies.label: T2
enemies.name: T2(fighter turn-away feint)
enemies.decision_reason: The target deserves tracking, but its turn-away behavior should reduce attack priority.
enemies.core_features: approaches then turns away

enemies.label: T3
enemies.name: T3(escort fighter in defensive posture)
enemies.decision_reason: The fighter is not the primary striker, but it can quickly change posture.
enemies.core_features: escort and possible transition to attack

enemies.label: T4
enemies.name: T4(fighter electronic interference platform)
enemies.decision_reason: The target supports the attack package but does not show direct strike geometry.
enemies.core_features: electronic interference, S-like maneuver tendency

enemies.label: T5
enemies.name: T5(B-52H standoff platform)
enemies.decision_reason: The platform can launch weapons outside the defense zone, so early positioning is preferred.
enemies.core_features: high altitude, medium speed, standoff platform

enemies.label: T6
enemies.name: T6(AGM-86B-like shortcut missile)
enemies.decision_reason: The predicted flight path crosses the formation envelope, so interception and local evasion should be triggered.
enemies.core_features: attack course, very small shortcut, medium range
